{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's veil
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|If [[Lindon]] does not remove his [[veil]], others cannot feel his power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
